query: before we start the CX design work i need to do a proper situation analysis of this company — I've got their annual report, last year's NPS data, and a competitor snapshot. Can you help me work through what the business context is before we map any journeys?

I'm kicking off a CX transformation engagement at a utilities company next week. They've sent me a stack of docs — board paper, operational dashboard, VOC summary. I need to understand the business health before I can start designing interventions.

we're writing a CX strategy for a regional bank and i want to understand how the business is actually performing before we make recommendations — revenue trajectory, customer metrics, the works. they've given us some data but it's a bit scattered

I need to do a five-domain diagnostic for a supermarket chain — look at their revenue, NPS, operational efficiency, market position, and whether the org is capable of delivering a CX transformation. I've got their annual report and a staff survey pasted below.

our client keeps saying 'we're doing fine commercially so CX isn't urgent' — i want to stress-test that claim by doing a proper business health check against their actual data before the steering committee meeting

i need to frame up the 'why does CX matter for this business specifically' argument. can you help me read through their performance data and identify the tensions — the places where two true things are in conflict?

working on a pitch for a hospital network's patient experience transformation. need to do a situation analysis from the materials they've shared — financial performance, patient satisfaction data, staff engagement survey. what's the story the data tells?

I've uploaded three documents: a strategy deck, a voice of customer report, and a market research summary. Can you analyse the business context from these and tell me what the key tensions are before we run the discovery workshop?

my client's leadership team has very different views on whether the business is in good shape. i need an evidence-based diagnostic that can cut through the politics and say: here's what the data actually shows, here's where we're at risk, here's the so what for the CX agenda
can you help me understand what's causing our client's churn rate to be so high? they've lost 15% of customers in the last year
I need to create a financial model to project the ROI of a CX investment over 3 years — what assumptions should I use?
what macro trends should I know about before presenting to the board of a retail bank?
can you help me identify the internal and organisational blockers preventing our CX program from getting traction?
I want to benchmark our client's NPS against their industry peers — where can I find the data and what's a good score for a telco?
we're writing a business case for a self-service portal and need to show the CFO it will pay back within 18 months
can you summarise this annual report for me? I just need the key numbers
I need to understand the competitive landscape in health insurance — who are the main players and what are they competing on?
my client wants me to help them build their CX strategy — where should I start?
can you help me build a prioritisation framework for which CX initiatives to invest in first
I need to prepare for a stakeholder interview — what questions should I ask the CEO before we start the CX program?
